howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Here's a step-by-step guide to using our platform
howItWorks.step1Description: Sign up with your email and create a password
howItWorks.step2Description: Add your personal information and preferences
howItWorks.step3Description: Begin searching for travel companions or housing options
howItWorks.supportDescription: Check out our frequently asked questions

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: You can reset your password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page

faqs.question: Is my personal information secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your data

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can reach us through the contact form in your account settings

faqs.question: Can I change my travel preferences later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can update your preferences anytime in your profile

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal
